name: Pecan Macaroons/TVFN
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300°F.
2. Beat the egg whites with 3/4 cup sugar until stiff and glossy peaks form.
3. Gently fold in the oat bran, pecans, amaretto, and almond extract.
4. Drop by tablespoonfuls onto a baking sheet sprayed with nonstick cooking spray.
5. Bake until golden brown and firm.
6. Remove from pan and cool on wire racks.
7. Store tightly covered.
